AI will never automate anything on its own—it always suggests, and you're always in control of what gets created or enabled. That way, you can review and decide what fits your workflow before making any changes.

And yes, the Free plan does have usage limits, including limits on records and active automations. You can find the complete breakdown on our pricing page: Zoho Tables Pricing.   
  
If you have any questions about which plan is right for your use case, feel free to write to support@zohotables.com.

Maker [...] We're also building an AI assistant for every base. You'll be able to ask things like, "Add a Priority field," "Create a linked Expenses table," "Show me expenses over $100," or "Generate sample data," and it'll take care of it. The goal is to let you build, organize, and work with your data using natural language instead of clicking through menus.

We're planning to launch it publicly later this quarter, and we're really excited about what it'll unlock for our users.  
If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to write to support@zohotables.com. We'd love to hear from you!

Review Modular DS? [...] SocialX

5.0

Based on 12 reviews

Review Modular DS?

Reviewers say Modular DS is a practical, agency-friendly way to manage many WordPress sites from one dashboard. They repeatedly praise bulk updates, backups and restores, uptime monitoring, reporting, database cleanup, and time savings, with several saying support is unusually fast and responsive and that new features arrive steadily. A founder review echoes that momentum but notes backup and restore setup can be more involved than rivals. A few users also want better mobile layouts, more integrations, faster sync on very large sites, and broader cache-clearing support.

#### What's great [...] Bulk plugin updates and database optimization are huge time-savers too. Features like these make a real difference for any agency or freelancer managing multiple sites.

But what truly stands out for us isn’t just our internal experience. We’ve seen several partner agencies and clients become such fans of Modular DS that they started recommending it to their friends and contacts. The satisfaction is contagious, and the value speaks for itself.

Modular DS is simply essential for agencies and freelancers. There’s no review that can fully capture how happy we are with it—we always recommend Modular DS to everyone in our network.

#### vs Alternatives

We chose Modular DS because it addresses nearly all the pain points an agency faces when managing multiple WordPress websites:

We noticed a gap in Notion’s import capabilities, something that’s been a pain point for many users, and we believe we’ve created a solution that truly addresses it. Whether it’s handling large files or simplifying the import process, our tool is designed to make your workflow smoother and more efficient.

Looking forward to hearing your thoughts and feedback. 🚀
